reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Buena estacion. La nafta super anda bien, infinia tambien pero es mas cara. Muchos surtidores. Tiene para cargar aire a las cubiertas, para limpiar los vidrios y llenar el sapito (muy importante). Recomendada

(Translated by Google)
Good station. The premium gasoline is good, Infinia is too but more expensive. Plenty of pumps. They have tire inflators, windshield washer fluid, and windshield washer fluid (very important). Recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSLTVqOG9RRRAB
